annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen enumeration and metadata (geometry, scale, refresh). Notifications when screens are added, removed, or geometry changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the list of screen names (e.g. DP-1, HDMI-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of screen names.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return detailed info for a screen as JSON (geometry, scale, refresh rate, etc.).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen info as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the stable EDID-based screen identifier for a connector name. Format: manufacturer:model:serial (or connector name fallback for virtual displays).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Connector name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Stable EDID-based screen identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the name of the primary screen. Prefers KWin output order over QGuiApplication::primaryScreen().

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Primary screen name.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Override the primary screen with the KWin compositor's output order primary. Called by the KWin effect on daemon ready.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name from Workspace::outputOrder().first().

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the available geometry (excluding panels/taskbars) for a screen. Uses layer-shell sensor data when available, falls back to Qt's availableGeometry.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier (EDID-based or connector name).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Available geometry as (x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a new screen is connected.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a screen is disconnected.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a screen's resolution or position changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen whose geometry changed.
